x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to pay funds from one account to another.

Comment:
Example: Customer schedules €500 payment to supplier

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to move funds between accounts. 

Comment:
Example: €1,000 transferred from checking to savings

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to disburse a loan. 

Comment:
Example: €10,000 personal loan approved

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Repayment Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to repay a loan. 

Comment:
Example: €500 monthly mortgage repayment scheduled

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Prepayment Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Early repayment instruction. 

Comment:
Example: Customer pays extra €2,000 principal

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to apply bank fees. 

Comment:
Example: €10 monthly maintenance fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to credit or accrue interest. 

Comment:
Example: €50 interest on savings

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correction Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to adjust previous booking. 

Comment:
Example: Reverse €100 wrongly debited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rollover Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to extend or renew product. 

Comment
Example: Term deposit €10,500 rolled over

x-enumeration-literals.name: Salary Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to credit employee salaries. 

Comment:
Example: €3,000 salary scheduled

x-enumeration-literals.name: External Payment Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to pay third parties outside bank. 

Comment:
Example: €2,000 SWIFT transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Provision Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to set aside funds for provisions. 

Comment:
Example: €500 loan loss provision

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payout Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to pay dividends. 

Comment:
Example: €200 shareholder dividend

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conversion Booking
Tax Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to deduct or accrue taxes. 

Comment:
Example: €50 withholding tax

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capital Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction affecting capital accounts. 

Comment:
Example: €10,000 capital injection

x-enumeration-literals.name: Suspense Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction for unidentified transactions. 

Comment:
Example: €300 received with unknown origin

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Recurring transfer/payment. 

Comment:
Example: €200 monthly rent

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to record overdraft usage. 

Comment:
Example: €500 overdraft utilized

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Transaction Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction for card usage. 

Comment:
Example: €150 credit card payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cheque Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to process cheques or drafts. 

Comment:
Example: €1,000 cheque deposited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction for third-party debit. 

Comment:
Example: €100 utility bill

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Deposit Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction for cash movement. 

Comment:
Example: €1,000 deposited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Restructure Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to modify loan terms. 

Comment:
Example: Extend loan tenure 12 months

x-enumeration-literals.name: Penalty Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to apply penalties. 

Comment:
Example: €100 late payment fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction related to collateral/guarantee. 

Comment:
Example: Collateral release

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Subscription Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description: Instruction for recurring investment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Redemption Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to redeem investments. 

Comment:
Example: €2,000 fixed deposit redemption

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commission Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to credit commissions or incentives. 

Comment:
Example: €50 agent commission

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Capitalization Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to add interest to principal. 

Comment:
Example: €50 interest added

x-enumeration-literals.name: Foreign Remittance Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction for international payment. 

Comment:
Example: €5,000 SWIFT payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Rollover Booking
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Instruction to extend or renew loan/deposit. 

Comment:
Example: €10,500 rolled over
